OneAssist 2 Years Total Protection Plan for Laptop Between INR 70001-80000 (E-Mail Delivery Only)

from One Assist
3.2 (60)
₹3,799.00
  • Total Protection: Secure your Laptops from any accidental and liquid damage or electrical/mechanical failure for an extended period - digitally delivered in your registered e-mail within 24 hours with an easy 2-step activation process and a completely digital journey for the user
  • What's covered: –2 years coverage on any external Accidental and Liquid Damage caused unintentionally -additional 1 year of coverage of mechanical or electrical failures as covered by the device’s brand warranty - Multiple Claims up to Sum Insured - Sum Insured up to 55% of the device invoice value for ADLD, 100% of the device invoice value for extended warranty cover - Repairs from Brand Authorized Service Centres - 24*7 Call center support
  • What's not covered: - Any Intentional damage/loss - unauthorized/ third party repairs - cosmetic damages - accessories loss/damage
  • For your convenience: Easy Claim Process: Download the app, OneAssist from the App Store or Play Store or Visit our website www.oneassist.in, or Call our 24x7 operational customer support at 1800-123-3330
  • Disclaimer: The plan can be purchased only along with the product. The user must be 18 years or older. Only valid for products with a minimum 1-YEAR Brand warranty in India. The combined Sum Insured i.e., ADLD + EW cover shall not exceed 100% of the device invoice value. The plan cancellation window is 15 days and the customer needs to inform OA via buyer/seller message or via OA chatbot and OA App.

10 days Replacement by Brand

Replacement Reason Replacement Period Replacement Policy
Defective Item 10 days from delivery HP warranty policy (Repair /Replacement by HP)
Physical Damage,
Wrong and Missing Item 		10 days from delivery Replacement
Defective item:
  • HP will provide On-call support followed by a technician inspection at your location.
  • HP expert will repair the product or provide a replacement or service letter, as applicable. Time taken for resolution will be as per HP policies
Physical Damage, Wrong, Missing Items:
  • Returns will not be accepted if it is an Open Box Delivery order
  • Remote verification by image/video will be done by Amazon
Know More

Replacement Instructions

Keep the item in its original condition and packaging along with MRP tag and accessories for a successful pick-up.

Replacement verification

During on-call support, you may be prompted to upload an image for verification. Further inspection or repair will be done at your doorstep by HP as per their warranty policies.
Read full returns policy
Free Delivery
The product is eligible for Free delivery. Learn more
1 Year Warranty
1 YEAR
What is Pay on Delivery (Cash/Card)?
Pay on Delivery (Cash/Card) payment method includes Cash on Delivery (COD) as well as Debit card / Credit card / Net banking payments at your doorstep.
Top Brand
Top Brand indicates high quality, trusted brands on Amazon aggregated basis verified ratings, returns/refunds and recent order history at brand level.
Services Available
Service support is available with the product to make it ready to use. Service applicable on the product can be availed on the product detail page or during checkout. For Brand provided services, we will notify the brand once the product is delivered. Brand will subsequently contact to you to schedule the service. For paid services by Brands like AC installation the charges need to be paid directly to the brand technician we will initiate the request on your behalf

All services are listed below
  • Free installation and demo on Televisions. **Installation at the time of delivery available in select pincodes View details.Wall mount brackets are chargeable if not included in the box along with the TV
  • Free Phone set-up service at the time of delivery is available in select regions. This can be availed during checkout by selecting a time slot that mentions "with setup".View details
  • Free installation on Washing Machines and Refrigerator
  • Paid Installations for Air Conditioners and Chimneys. For Brand provided AC installations, service charges will have to be paid to the brand technician directly
  • Free assembly services for Furniture items requiring professional assembly
  • Paid set-up service on Laptops and SSD
  • Installation/Assembly &/or Set-up services are also available on Dishwashers, Security cameras, Cycles, Inverters, Soundbars
  • Automotive support: Tyre installation, Engine oil change, Brake disk replacement etc. available in select pincodes
Learn more
Service support is available along with product purchase for your convenience.

Many Brands provide the service themselves. For brand provided services we register a service request with the brand once the product is delivered. There might be additional charges in some cases for the services availed. Read more on Brand provided services

Order processed by Amazon; delivered through our courier partners

Add Laptop Set-up Service Details
Price:₹740.003.8 stars (4107)
See more
Service
Details
  • Service carried out by a background-verified expert at your scheduled time slot.
  • Service includes unboxing the laptop, Operation System installation, driver installation, activation of MS office (if pre-installed), account setup, initial configuration, data transfer, security setup, basic customization and demo.
  • Wi-Fi connection needs to be provided by customer. WIFI configuration (If customer has wifi)
  • This is a standalone service and cannot be combined with doorstep exchange services. Please back up your data before the technician arrives.
  • For the purpose of the service, you allow Amazon and/or its affiliates to share your contact information and order information with the brand/authorized third party service providers to contact you to provide services during the product lifecycle. For this purpose, you consent and authorize the brand/authorized third party service providers to process your information for the purposes specified above.

About this item

  • Processor, Memory & Storage: Intel Core i5-13420H (up to 4.6 GHz with Intel Turbo Boost Technology, 12 MB L3 cache, 8 cores, 12 threads)| Memory: 16 GB DDR4-3200 MT/s (1 x 16 GB)| Storage: 512 GB PCIe Gen4 NVMe M.2 SSD
  • Operating System & Preinstalled Software: Windows 11 Home | MS Office Home 2024 |1 year Microsoft 365 Basic Free
  • Display & Graphics: 39.6 cm (15.6") diagonal, FHD (1920 x 1080), 144 Hz, IPS, micro-edge, anti-glare, 300 nits, 62.5% sRGB| Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 Laptop GPU (4 GB GDDR6 dedicated)
  • Ports & Connectivity : 1 USB Type-A 5Gbps signaling rate (HP Sleep and Charge); 1 USB Type-A 5Gbps signaling rate; 1 AC smart pin; 1 HDMI 2.1; 1 headphone/microphone combo; 1 RJ-45; 1 USB Type-C 5Gbps signaling rate (DisplayPort 1.4a, HP Sleep and Charge)| Connectivity: Realtek Wi-Fi 6 (2x2) and Bluetooth 5.4 wireless card
  • Other Features: Camera: HP Wide Vision 720p HD camera with temporal noise reduction and integrated dual array digital microphones| Keyboard: Full-size, backlit, performance blue opaque keyboard with numeric keypad| Audio: DTS:X Ultra; Dual speakers; HP Audio Boost

    How are ratings calculated?
    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    • Rakesh Kohale
      5 out of 5 stars
      Good budget laptop for gaming and editing
      Reviewed in India on 23 April 2026
      Style Name: 16GB, 512GB, 4GB RTX 3050Configuration: Without HP Care
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Pros:

      * Fast performance (13th Gen i5 is smooth for work & gaming)

      * Good for multitasking (16GB RAM + SSD is fast)

      * 144Hz display feels smooth

      * Dedicated graphics (good for gaming & editing)

      * Value for money

      Cons:

      * Battery backup is average (~4–6 hrs)

      * Heating during heavy gaming

      * Build is plastic

      Final:

      Good laptop for gaming + office + editing. 👍

      Read moreRead less
